title: Support  - Device with device connected
scenario: Device Support screen shows paired device list and detail modal with device info and "Go" button when navigating to Menu > Support > Device
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected to the phone.
3. From the Home screen, tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu).
6. Observe the screen that appears — it should display an image, the question "What device are you having issues with?", and a list of paired devices.
7. Select a device from the list.

8. Observe the modal that slides up — it should show device details (name, product ID, serial number, software version, HW revision, last connected) and a "Go" button, along with instructions to send the information to Support.
expected: A screen appears with an image, the question "What device are you having issues with?", and a list of paired devices. After selecting a device, a modal slides up showing device details (name, product ID, serial number, software version, HW revision, last connected) and a "Go" button, with instructions to send the information to Support.
